Package org.apache.juneau.rest.client

Class BasicRestLogger

java.lang.Object
org.apache.juneau.rest.client.BasicRestLogger
All Implemented Interfaces:
RestLogger
public final class BasicRestLogger extends Object implements RestLogger
Convenience RestLogger implementation that routes log entries to a System.Logger.

Uses the JDK 9+ System.Logger facade, which automatically routes to whatever logging framework is on the classpath (SLF4J, Log4j 2, Logback, JUL) with no additional dependency.

Example — shorthand:

RestClient client = RestClient.builder() .logger(BasicRestLogger.of(System.getLogger("myapp.http"))) .build();

Example — custom level resolver and template:

RestClient client = RestClient.builder() .logger(BasicRestLogger.create() .logger(System.getLogger("myapp.http")) .infoTemplate("{method} {uri} -> {status} ({elapsed})") .errorTemplate("{method} {uri} -> {error} ({elapsed})") .build()) .build();

Default behavior (no filter, all requests logged, using RestLogLevelResolver.DEFAULT):

  • INFO → "GET https://api.example.com/users -> 200 OK (42ms)"
  • WARNING → "GET https://api.example.com/users -> 404 Not Found (8ms)"
  • ERROR → "GET https://api.example.com/users -> connection refused (12ms)" + exception

Beta — API subject to change: This type is part of the next-generation REST client and HTTP stack (org.apache.juneau.marshall.ng.*). It is not API-frozen: binary- and source-incompatible changes may appear in the next major Juneau release (and possibly earlier).

See Also:
  • juneau-ng REST client
Since:
9.2.1

    • of

      public static BasicRestLogger of(System.Logger logger)
      Creates a BasicRestLogger using RestLogLevelResolver.DEFAULT and default templates.
      Parameters:
      logger - The target System.Logger. Must not be null.
      Returns:
      A new instance. Never null.
